The park entry fee is reasonable and you can see a bunch of cool things in an hour. I paid $10 for parking and had to help a dad get a parking pass because the machine didn’t work for him. 

If you get lucky timing you can see active large cats. The coolest animal here is the red panda. 

Gift shop and cafe workers and selections were nice!

Tired old park. The zoo should be called Memorial. Jaguar, dead! Panda, dead! I’ve come here for years and have yet to see an anteater. There is an abundance of squirrels and goats. The tom turkey was impressive. 

You should pack water and a picnic lunch. Spent $95 on dry burgers and baby corn dogs.

Happy Hollow Park & Zoo is a family-friendly destination, featuring interactive exhibits, amusement rides, and a small zoo with over 140 animals. The puppet theater and nature play areas make it a great spot for young children, while the lemur and miniature horse exhibits add to the experience. The park is well-maintained, though weekends can get crowded, leading to longer wait times for rides.
